tasks.name: Select and start booking the cheapest full-body color change for an SUV under $2000
tasks.description: Find full-body repaint packages for SUVs, filter them to show options under $2000, sort by price, and add the cheapest qualifying package to the cart or booking flow.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled 'Services' or similar.
From the services list, click on the category labeled 'Full Body Color Change' or equivalent.
On the full body color change page, locate the vehicle type filter and select 'SUV' from the list of vehicle types.
Find the price filter controls and set the maximum price field to '2000', then apply the filter.
Locate the sort dropdown for the package list and select the 'Price: Low to High' sorting option.
In the filtered and sorted results, click on the first package card that appears in the list (the cheapest qualifying SUV full-body color change).
On the selected package detail page, click the 'Add to Cart' or 'Start Booking' button to begin the purchase or booking process for that package.

tasks.name: Book the earliest available Saturday morning appointment for custom racing stripes on a coupe
tasks.description: Locate the custom racing stripes service and schedule the earliest available Saturday appointment with a start time between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM for a coupe, then proceed to the booking confirmation step.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation item labeled 'Services' or similar.
In the services list or search bar, select or search for 'Custom Racing Stripes' and click on that service.
On the custom racing stripes service page, click the 'Book Now' or similar booking button.
In the booking form, select 'Coupe' as the vehicle type from the vehicle type dropdown.
Open the date picker and navigate to the upcoming calendar dates, then select the nearest upcoming Saturday that shows available appointment slots.
In the time slot list for that date, select the earliest start time that falls between '9:00 AM' and '11:00 AM'.

Fill in the required contact fields with placeholder data (for example, name, phone number, and email), select the appointment type option 'Drop-off' if available, and click the button labeled 'Confirm Appointment' or equivalent to finalize the booking step.

tasks.name: Configure a two-tone red and black gloss paint package for a 2-door coupe under $1800 and save it
tasks.description: Use the custom paint configurator to create a two-tone red and black gloss paint scheme for a 2-door coupe, limit results to packages costing $1800 or less, choose the cheapest option, and save the configuration.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation menu item labeled 'Custom Paint' or 'Configurator' to open the paint configuration tool.
In the vehicle type selection area, choose '2-Door Coupe' from the available options.
In the color selection panel, set the primary color to a red shade and the secondary color to a black shade, and choose 'Gloss' as the finish for both colors if a finish selector is available.
Locate the price or budget filter area, and set the maximum price to '1800', then apply the filter to limit the available packages.
Use the sorting dropdown for packages or configurations and choose 'Price: Low to High' to order the qualifying options.
From the filtered and sorted packages, click on the first configuration or package shown (the cheapest two-tone option within the budget).
On the package detail or summary screen, click the 'Save Configuration', 'Save to Quote', or similar button to store this specific two-tone configuration to the user’s saved items or quote list.

tasks.name: Apply a full-body color change promo code to a qualifying service over $1200
tasks.description: Find an active promotion for full-body color change services, then start booking a qualifying full-body color change package priced over $1200 and apply the promo code during checkout.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation link labeled 'Special Offers', 'Deals', or similar to open the promotions page.
On the promotions page, locate a promo or coupon that specifically mentions 'Full Body Color Change' and note the promo code text displayed.
Use the main navigation to go to the 'Services' section and click on the 'Full Body Color Change' category.
On the full body color change services list, use any available price filter to set the minimum price to '1200' and apply the filter.
From the filtered list of packages, click on any package card that is shown (ensuring it appears in the filtered list of options over $1200).
On the selected package detail page, click the 'Add to Cart' or 'Book Now' button to proceed to the checkout or booking summary page.

On the checkout or booking summary page, locate the field labeled 'Promo Code' or 'Coupon Code', type the previously noted promo code into that field, and click the 'Apply' button to apply the discount.

tasks.name: Compare ceramic vs standard clear coat for a full-body repaint and select the option with the longest warranty
tasks.description: Compare at least one ceramic clear coat package and one standard clear coat package for a full-body repaint, then choose the package that offers the longest warranty and add it to the cart or booking.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation item labeled 'Services' or 'Packages' and then select the category for 'Full Body Repaint' or similar.

On the full body repaint page, locate any filter or selector for 'Clear Coat Type' and first select 'Standard Clear Coat', then add one visible standard clear coat package to a comparison list using an 'Add to Compare' or similar button.
Change the clear coat filter to 'Ceramic Clear Coat' and add one visible ceramic clear coat package to the comparison list using the same 'Add to Compare' or similar control.
Open the comparison view by clicking on the 'Compare' button or icon that shows the selected packages side by side.
In the comparison table, identify the package row that indicates the longest warranty duration and click the 'Select Package' or 'View Details' button associated with that specific package.
On the selected package detail page that opens, click the 'Add to Cart' or 'Start Booking' button to proceed with the package that has the longest warranty.
Continue to the next step in the checkout or booking flow by clicking the 'Continue' or 'Next' button on the cart or booking summary page.

tasks.name: Find the highest-rated shop location within 20 miles of ZIP 90001 and open its details
tasks.description: Use the locations or find-a-shop feature to search around ZIP code 90001, filter locations within 20 miles, sort by rating, and open the detail page of the highest-rated shop.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation item labeled 'Locations', 'Find a Shop', or similar to open the locations search page.
In the ZIP or postal code search field, type '90001' and confirm the location search by pressing Enter or clicking the search icon.
Locate the distance or radius filter and set it to '20 miles' (or select the 20-mile option from a dropdown), then apply the filter.
Find the sorting control for the locations list and choose 'Rating: High to Low' from the available sorting options.
From the sorted list, click on the first location card, representing the highest-rated shop within 20 miles of ZIP 90001.
On the location detail page that opens, scroll down to the section that lists business hours and contact information.
Within that section, click the 'View Map', 'Get Directions', or similar link to open the map or direction-related view for that specific shop location.

tasks.name: Submit a contact form request about color-matching for a fleet of 5+ vehicles
tasks.description: Use the contact form to submit an inquiry about custom color-matching services for a fleet of more than 5 vehicles, including preferred contact method and a detailed message.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation link labeled 'Contact', 'Contact Us', or similar to open the contact page.
On the contact page, locate the topic or inquiry type dropdown and select the option labeled 'Fleet & Commercial', 'Business Services', or the closest equivalent.
In the name field, type a full name (for example, 'Alex Johnson'), and in the email field, type a placeholder email address such as 'alex@example.com'.
In the phone number field, type a sample 10-digit phone number such as '5551234567'.
Locate the preferred contact method selector and choose 'Phone' as the preferred method of contact.

In the message text area, type a detailed inquiry of at least 50 characters describing a request for custom color-matching services for a fleet of more than 5 vehicles, including mention of the approximate fleet size (for example, 'We have a fleet of 8 vans...').
Click the 'Send Message', 'Submit', or equivalent button to submit the fleet color-matching inquiry through the contact form.

tasks.name: Save five matte black or gray paint jobs from the gallery to favorites
tasks.description: Browse the gallery, filter to matte finishes in black or gray, then mark the first five qualifying gallery items as favorites and view them in the favorites section.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation item labeled 'Gallery', 'Before & After', or similar to open the visual gallery page.
On the gallery page, use the finish filter to select 'Matte' as the desired finish type and apply the filter.
Use the color filter to include only black and gray tones by selecting 'Black' and 'Gray' (or a combined 'Black/Gray' option) from the color options and updating the gallery results.
Scroll through the filtered gallery until at least five matte black or gray items are visible on the screen.
For each of the first five visible qualifying gallery items, click the 'Favorite', heart icon, or 'Save' button on the item thumbnail to add it to the favorites list.
After saving five items, locate and click on the 'Favorites', 'Saved', or heart icon in the header or gallery navigation to open the favorites page.
On the favorites page, scroll through the list to view the set of saved matte black or gray paint jobs that were just added.

website_type: auto body custom paint services website
